description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image, caching the node_modules directory, and installing the Vercel CLI globally via yarn global add now in a before_script. Define a single deploy stage with a deploy job that only runs on the master branch. In the deploy job execute the following commands in order: NOW_URL=$(now --token $NOW_TOKEN --team $NOW_TEAM --name $APP_NAME -e VUE_APP_INTERCOM_ID -e VUE_APP_ANALYTICS_ID -e VUE_APP_FACEBOOK_ID -e VUE_APP_PIXEL_ID -e APP_URL -e VUE_APP_GOOGLE_SITE_VERIFICATION -e REVAS_PUBLIC_API_URL -e REVAS_ORGANIZATION_ID --force); now scale --token $NOW_TOKEN --team $NOW_TEAM $NOW_URL 1; now alias --token $NOW_TOKEN --team $NOW_TEAM $NOW_URL $APP_URL; now rm --token $NOW_TOKEN --team $NOW_TEAM --safe --yes $APP_NAME. No artifacts are defined.
